title: Heart Rate Zone Calculator - Optimize Your Training
description: Free heart rate zone calculator. Find your target heart rate zones for fat burn, cardio, and peak performance based on your age and resting heart rate.
keywords: heart rate zone calculator, target heart rate, training zones, fat burn zone, cardio zone calculator
intro: Calculate your heart rate training zones using the Karvonen method. Enter your age and resting heart rate to find optimal training intensities.

faq.q: How are heart rate zones calculated?
faq.a: This uses the Karvonen formula: Target HR = ((Max HR - Resting HR) × Intensity%) + Resting HR. Max HR is estimated as 220 minus your age.

faq.q: What is the fat burning zone?
faq.a: The fat burning zone is typically 50-70% of your maximum heart rate. At this intensity, a higher percentage of calories burned comes from fat.

faq.q: How do I find my resting heart rate?
faq.a: Measure your pulse first thing in the morning before getting out of bed. Count beats for 60 seconds for the most accurate reading.
